scripts.build: pnpm run build:frontend && mkdir -p backend/public && cp -r frontend/dist/. backend/public/ && pnpm run build:backend
scripts.deploy: pnpm run build && sam deploy --template-file template.yaml --stack-name google-drive-markdown-editor --capabilities CAPABILITY_IAM --resolve-s3 --parameter-overrides GoogleClientId=$GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID GoogleClientSecret=$GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET SessionSecret=$SESSION_SECRET
scripts.deploy:guided: pnpm run build && sam deploy --guided --template-file template.yaml
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter frontend typecheck && pnpm --filter backend typecheck
